name: zero-runtime
description: A runtime-centered coding agent with deterministic execution, local session memory, and provider abstraction.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.mvp:test: npm run check && npm run product-flow:test && npm run cli:all:test && npm run patch:all:test && npm run scaffold:all:test && npm run security:all:test && npm run agent:all:test && npm run memory:all:test && npm run provider:all:test
scripts.rc:test: npm run mvp:test && npm run release:readiness:test
scripts.real-provider:test: npm run provider:openrouter-client:test && npm run repair:openrouter-smoke:test && npm run agent:real-provider-smoke:test
scripts.provider:all:test: npm run provider:strategy:test && npm run provider:runtime:test && npm run provider:config:test && npm run provider:openrouter-config:test && npm run provider:response-normalizer:test
scripts.runtime:all:test: npm run runtime:context && npm run runtime:test && npm run runtime:objective && npm run runtime:plan && npm run runtime:tools:test && npm run runtime:loop:test && npm run runtime:failure-loop:test && npm run runtime:project-memory-context:test
scripts.validation:all:test: npm run validation:test && npm run validation:feedback:test
scripts.tools:all:test: npm run tools:test && npm run guards:test && npm run filesystem:read:test && npm run filesystem:write:test
scripts.memory:all:test: npm run memory:test && npm run memory:project-store:test && npm run memory:architecture:test && npm run memory:sanitizer:test && npm run memory:reader:test && npm run memory:trust-level:test && npm run memory:poisoning:test
scripts.retrieval:all:test: npm run retrieval:test && npm run retrieval:planning:test
scripts.git:all:test: npm run git:test && npm run git:awareness:test
scripts.observability:all:test: npm run observability:test && npm run observability:integration:test && npm run observability:loop:test
scripts.real-project:all:test: npm run real-project:trial:test && npm run real-project:validation:test
scripts.repair:all:test: npm run repair:context:test && npm run repair:attempt:test && npm run repair:proposal:test && npm run repair:quality:test && npm run repair:fake-provider:test && npm run repair:attempt-fake:test && npm run repair:model-policy:test && npm run repair:policy-aware-provider:test && npm run repair:memory-context:test && npm run repair:openrouter-provider:test
scripts.agent:all:test: npm run agent:loop:test && npm run agent:step:test && npm run agent:approval:test && npm run agent:patch-apply:test && npm run agent:full-loop:test && npm run agent:memory-context:test && npm run agent:provider-config:test && npm run agent:provider-policy:test && npm run agent:openrouter-opt-in:test && npm run agent:provider-runtime-flow:test && npm run agent:scaffold-module:test
scripts.cli:all:test: npm run cli:test && npm run cli:agent-flow:test && npm run cli:agent-ux:test && npm run cli:help-docs:test && npm run cli:repair-openrouter-provider:test && npm run cli:security-review:test && npm run cli:agent-provider-flow:test && npm run cli:agent-provider-step-flow:test && npm run cli:scaffold-module:test && npm run cli:scaffold-handoff:test && npm run cli:scaffold-apply-handoff:test && npm run cli:memory:test && npm run cli:demo-product-flow:test && npm run cli:quickstart:test
scripts.security:all:test: npm run security:test && npm run security:protected-paths:test && npm run security:protected-paths:integration:test && npm run security:provider-output:test && npm run security:patch-threat:test && npm run security:patch-threat:integration:test && npm run security:approval-bypass:test && npm run security:agent-loop-abuse:test && npm run security:agent-state:test && npm run security:memory-poisoning:test && npm run security:runtime-report-leak:test && npm run security:regression:test
scripts.scaffold:all:test: npm run scaffold:intent:test && npm run scaffold:request:test && npm run scaffold:proposal-parser:test && npm run scaffold:safety:test && npm run scaffold:patch-bridge:test && npm run scaffold:diff:test && npm run scaffold:runner:test && npm run cli:scaffold-module:test && npm run cli:scaffold-handoff:test && npm run cli:scaffold-apply-handoff:test && npm run agent:scaffold-module:test
